# DrawStamp Studio

DrawStamp Studio is a browser-local electronic stamp workspace for generating, extracting, editing, and exporting digital seal images.

## Site

- Home: https://wosp.cc.cd/
- About: https://wosp.cc.cd/about
- Privacy Policy: https://wosp.cc.cd/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://wosp.cc.cd/terms
- Contact: https://wosp.cc.cd/contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/fisher0627/DrawStamp_Studio

## What It Does

- Generates round and oval electronic stamp images.
- Extracts red stamp marks from scanned documents or photos in the browser.
- Edits text, fonts, borders, stars, inner circles, codes, and image elements on a canvas.
- Exports transparent PNG, white-background PNG, SVG, and JPEG files.
- Saves local drafts and supports JSON template import/export.

## Privacy And Safety

Core stamp drawing, image extraction, draft storage, and export workflows run locally in the browser. DrawStamp Studio does not upload stamp images for these core workflows.

The project is intended for learning, testing, design preview, and legally authorized use cases. It must not be used to forge contracts, official documents, invoices, or any other legal documents.
